embeds.description:
> - **1. :💬: Respectful Communication**
> All members are expected to engage in respectful and polite conversation. No harassment, hate speech, or bullying will be tolerated.
> 
> - **2. :🚫: No Spam**
> Avoid spamming text or voice channels. This includes excessive messages, irrelevant content, and unnecessary @mentions.
> 
> - **3. :🔒: Respect Privacy**
> Do not share personal information about yourself or others without explicit consent. This includes addresses, phone numbers, emails, etc.
> 
> - **4. :📢: No Self-Promotion or Advertising**
> Unsolicited promotion of other Discord servers, social media accounts, or products is not allowed.
> 
> - **5. :👮: Follow Discord’s Terms of Service**
> By being a member of this server, you are expected to adhere to Discord’s official Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.
> 
> - **6. :⚠️: Consequences**
> Violating these rules may result in a warning, mute, kick, or ban, depending on the severity of the violation.
> 
> - **7. :🗣️: Post Messages in Appropriate Channels**
> We have specific channels for most types of things. If you want to send a screenshot, use <#1437655575386394624> , If you want to talk about something<#1247050748806561864> , do it there, if you want to communicate with people who are on the server, do it in the <#1437658105495293982> webhook, etc.
> 
> - **8. :🎫: Need Support? Help Me Help *YOU*!**
> If you need support, want to have a bug fixed, or need to talk to staff about any problem, please open a <#1247050743085797417> support Ticket. Our staff will be happy to help! **We do NOT support cracked accounts**, but we won’t **actively** stop you from trying. Please understand that we can not enable the cracked account feature in the `server.properties` because of major security concerns such as being able to grant yourself admin privileges simply by changing your username to and administrator’s.
> 
> - **9. :📨: We can always use more members!**
> Want to invite someone? use the official discord server link! https://discord.gg/dQR6fJUxAM
> 
> - **10. :❔: To be Continued...**
> 
> Welcome to our server, and let’s build a great community together!🙌
embeds.title: **DISCORD SERVER RULES**
